title: HAL control — drive mocked inputs, observe the full round-trip to the outputs
description: Injects a digital and an analog HAL input, waits for the IoBlock to observe them, asserts the values reached its service properties, then advances one virtual second so the block's [Timer(1)] mirrors them onto the mocked outputs and ASSERTS those outputs. Exercises the serviceProviderSet / waitUntil / serviceProviderExpect scenario step types and the complete HAL loop: mocked input -> block -> observable property -> mocked output.

steps.label: wait until the block observes the digital input
the digital input reached the block
the analog input reached the block
fire the [Timer(1)] so the block mirrors the inputs onto the outputs
